zh.lifeSummary: 當Grain O Neill於0990年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，她的父親Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell31歲，母親O'Nell21歲。她於1019年與Duibhne O'Duibhne在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1078年在她的家鄉享年88歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grain O Neill于0990年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，她的父亲Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell31岁，母亲O'Nell21岁。她于1019年与Duibhne O'Duibhne在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1078年在她的家乡享年88岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Neil  , also probably representing shortened forms of the derived patronymics   McNeill   or the comparable Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Niel
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .

nameMeanings.name: Grain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Old Norse grein ‘inlet; fork in a river’, or a habitational name from some place with that or a similar name, such as Grain (Kent).
English: from the Old Norse personal name Grein, literally ‘branch’, but also ‘discord’ or ‘discernment’.

English: from Middle English grain ‘bud, pimple, pustule’ (Old French grain), possibly a nickname for a person with facial marks. From the late 16th century the name was augmented, or possibly superseded, by the name of the Protestant refugees from France and the Low Countries (see 4 below).

en.lifeSummary: When Grain O Neill was born in 0990, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell, was 31 and her mother, O'Nell, was 21. She married Duibhne O'Duibhne in 1019, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1078, in her hometown, at the age of 88, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grain O Neill est née en 0990, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, O'Nell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Duibhne O'Duibhne en 1019, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1078, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grain O Neillが0990年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nellは31歳，母O'Nellは21歳であった。1019年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトでDuibhne O'Duibhneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1078年に故郷で88歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난
ko.lifeSummary: Grain O Neill(이)가 0990년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 O'Nell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1019년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 Duibhne O'Duibhne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1078년 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

ru.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grain O Neill родилась в 0990 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Cornic "Airt vic Chuinn Cheudchathchich" O'Nell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали O'Nell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duibhne O'Duibhne в 1019 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1078 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.
